doc.description:
Discover GHCN-Daily stations by country and optional state filter.
Reads ghcnd-stations.txt and ghcnd-inventory.txt to verify data availability
before returning stations. Filters by min_years of coverage and required elements.

Download the GHCN-Daily CSV for a station from S3.
One file per station contains ALL years — no per-year loop needed.
Filters records to [start_year, end_year] range during download.

Analyze a station across its full date range in one handler call.
Reads the downloaded CSV, computes daily/yearly aggregates (TMAX, TMIN, PRCP),
and produces per-year climate summaries.

Compute region-level climate trend from station analyses.
Aggregates all station reports for a country+state, runs linear regression
on temperature and precipitation, generates narrative summary.
  this step waits for all station analyses to complete before aggregating.

params.name: station_count
params.description: Dependency signal — pass discovery.station_count to ensure

doc.description: Reverse geocode station coordinates via OSM Nominatim.
Analyze a single GHCN-Daily station: fetch CSV, analyze climate, reverse geocode.

Analyze climate trends for a state: discover stations, analyze each, compute trend.
DiscoverStations -> foreach station -> (FetchStationData, AnalyzeStationClimate, ReverseGeocode) -> ComputeRegionTrend.
Analyze climate trends for all 50 US states in parallel.
Analyze climate trends for all 13 Canadian provinces/territories.
Analyze climate trends for Russia.
Analyze climate trends for India.
Analyze climate trends for Mexico.
Analyze climate trends for Antarctica research stations.
Analyze climate trends for 10 South American countries.
Analyze climate trends for 18 European countries.
Analyze climate trends for 13 African countries.
Analyze climate trends for 7 Asian countries.
Analyze climate trends for 3 Arctic territories.

Cache GHCN-Daily data for one state: discover stations, download each station's CSV.
One FetchStationData per station (all years in one CSV).
Cache GHCN-Daily data for all 50 US states.
Cache GHCN-Daily data for all 13 Canadian provinces/territories.
